title: Magnetic Stirrer, Fast Stir Plate with Speed Control, Lab Magnetic Mixer with 1 Stir Bar and 1 Stir Bar Retriever, Brushless DC Motor, Liquid Stirring, Max Volume 3000ml,（No Heating）
description:
> Lightweight & Portable: The lab stirrer is light with only 0.22kg/0.49lbs.
> Simple & Easy: This magnetic stirrer is easy to use with a speed control knob.
> Powerful Motor: This stirrer has a strong motor to mix liquid to a max volume of 3000ml with 2000rpm speed.
> Wide Applications: It is widely used for scientific research, hospital and clinical stirring, biology experiments & chemistry science, farming, lab mixing and home mixing, making yeast, mixing liquor & drinks, etc
> 1-Year Warranty: A new replacement will be provided if the stirrer malfunctions within one year.
reviews_5s:
AnyLab Stirrer arrived quickly, well packaged and I found it to be of very good quality. It came with four diffent sized magnetic stirring "pills" and I held the longest one in my fist and brought it close to the stirrer base to test the strength of the unit. The base turns on with a solid "Click" and the speed adjustment is smooth and firm. At just "ON", the pill had no motion, but it was definitely attracted to the rotator under the base table surface As I increased the speed adjustment knob the "Pill" in my hand tried to stay in sync with the drive magnet and it vibrated strongly in my hand, even an inch above the table. Definitely a very effective stirrer that will probably do quite well, even with thick or viscous fluids. I'm going to use it to mix some vinaigrette dressing instead of shaking it. I'll also try it to mix some flavor syrup (liquor) into my coffee. Lab work? Yes, it'll do that too. The manual says it takes only 3 watts, but seems stronger than that. Overall rating: Great!!! Mine even came with a nice long Magnetic Pill Retriever.I bouth this magnetic stirrir primary usage for cocktails bar. it strong enough to mix sugar and cold water just fine without making a noise. it comes with the stirrir and magnetic wand as well.
Overall is very good. I'd recommed to buy itThis is exactly what I was looking for. Strong motor, mixers and magnetic wand are an absolute must for continuous mixing.I use this everyday to mix my powder supplements into my tea. Honestly, one of my best purchases. My tea is mixed smoothly with no lumps and everything is easy to clean.My students and I are using the stirrer for making media.
These are 1 liter bottles and work well.
Would highly recommend for the lab and great price.I use this for making structured water and it works fantastic!Very happy with this purchase.I use this almost everyday in my studio keeping the stains in my terra sig from settling. Highly recommendLove it!Bottle bottom has ridges so either dampen vibration with non-slip silicone pad or make centering pad with hole for plastic bottle.
reviews_1s: piece of junk, did not even last 60 days
